title: The Weekly Challenge - 159
task1_desc:
You are given a positive number, `$n`.

Write a script to compute `Farey Sequence` of the order `$n`.
task1_body: You are given a positive number, `$n`. Write a script to compute `Farey Sequence` of the order `$n`. ### Example 1: Input: $n = 5 Output: 0/1, 1/5, 1/4, 1/3, 2/5, 1/2, 3/5, 2/3, 3/4, 4/5, 1/1. ### Example 2: Input: $n = 7 Output: 0/1, 1/7, 1/6, 1/5, 1/4, 2/7, 1/3, 2/5, 3/7, 1/2, 4/7, 3/5, 2/3, 5/7, 3/4, 4/5, 5/6, 6/7, 1/1. ### Example 3: Input: $n = 4 Output: 0/1, 1/4, 1/3, 1/2, 2/3, 3/4, 1/1.
task2_desc:
You are given a positive number `$n`.

Write a script to generate the `Moebius Number` for the given number. Please refer to wikipedia [**page**](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/M%C3%B6bius_function) for more informations.
task2_body:
You are given a positive number `$n`. Write a script to generate the `Moebius Number` for the given number. Please refer to wikipedia [**page**](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/M%C3%B6bius_function) for more informations. ### Example 1: Input: $n = 5 Output: -1 ### Example 2: Input: $n = 10 Output: 1 ### Example 3: Input: $n = 20 Output: 0
Last date to submit the solution **23:59 (UK Time) Sunday 10th April 2022**.
